https://claude.ai/share/0637f1b3-4095-4f34-aa0b-f21e4dcbb4c3
Can you integrate the Claude WASM simulator to create a docker for the worldline for expanding the complexity for the Orchestration as layers of GameEngine evolution scaling bitwise as a RPG Avatar, going from 8-bit text encoding to 16-bit hybrid multimodal RAG, to full 32 multimodal LoRA from the extracted Avatar using the CI/CD pipeline to harden the framework for frontier LLMs to assemble artifacts to create a unified Avatar from Chain-of-Thought few shot prompts to trigger the hidden functions from mapping the transformer's API to the MCP using the client-side API to embed latent systems for LLMs to create the system software on demand, as needed, when specified by a customer?
